signals.headline: Incoming Bank of Korea Governor Nominee Warns of Accelerating Consumer Inflation | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Incoming Bank of Korea Governor Nominee Warns of Accelerating Consumer Inflation | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Shin Hyun-song, the incoming Bank of Korea chief, stated on April 14, 2026, that headline consumer inflation is likely to accelerate, amid rising import prices from Middle East tensions.[1][3]

signals.headline: Fed March FOMC Minutes Confirm Rate Hike Discussions | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Fed March FOMC Minutes Confirm Rate Hike Discussions | YES | MED confidence**  
March 2026 FOMC minutes revealed some participants advocating rate hikes if inflation exceeds 2%, driven by Middle East energy shocks, though Chair Powell views impacts as short-term (98.4% chance of April hold per CME FedWatch).[2]

signals.headline: Kevin Warsh Nominated as New US Fed Chair | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Kevin Warsh Nominated as New US Fed Chair | YES | HIGH confidence**  
President Trump nominated former Fed Governor Kevin Warsh as new Fed Chair, sparking KOSPI drop over 5% and market volatility, with forecasts now seeing US core CPI at 3.2% in 2026 amid sticky inflation.[4][5]
matched_markets: Kevin Warsh confirmed as Fed Chair by May 15?
